name: The Beginning Of Us
overview: Best friends Via and Arkin enter high school together. But Arkin is worried that Via isn’t making any other friends. So, Arkin makes a bet with her that’ll get her out of her comfort zone and make new friends.

name: Best "Friends"
overview: The much awaited Foundation Week has arrived. But what was supposed to be a fun celebration quickly devolves into fighting. As Via and her friends band together to help Yanna, could this be the start of a beautiful friendship?

name: Happy Crush
overview: As the Foundation Week continues, Via and Arkin finally “get married”. But Via realizes that she might just have a crush on someone else

name: Blurred Lines
overview: As Via’s crush on Chevy grows stronger, so is the distance between Via and Arkin.  Can the two still mend their friendship?

name: Lintek Na Feelings
overview: Via finds Arkin being close with another girl leading to a misunderstanding between the two.

name: Damn-damin
overview: Arkin’s confession puts a strain on Via and Arkin’s friendship. Can the two still go back to how they were before?

name: Mahal Kita...?
overview: As Via and Arkin begin their college lives in separate universities, they try their hardest to still spend time together as if nothing has changed. But it seems a change is brewing within Via’s feelings for Arkin.

name: Cut The Chase
overview: While Via tries to be supportive of Arkin’s dreams, their paths begin to diverge. And with another of Arkin’s lies, will they still be able to keep their friendship?

name: The Fangirl And the Actor
overview: Even after the kiss from Arkin, Via continues to deny her feelings. But with Arkin gaining more love from his fans and getting a new beautiful on-screen partner, can Via still keep her feelings to herself?

name: Officially Yours
overview: Via and Arkin officially tell their friends and loved ones of their relationship. But upon meeting Clea, her insecurity starts to creep up.

name: What Lovers Do
overview: As Via contemplates taking her relationship with Arkin to the next level, it seems Arkin’s partnership with Clea is also turning into something more.

name: Quiet Before Chaos
overview: Via and Arkin reach their first anniversary as a couple. But Arkin has to work on the day of their anniversary. Will the two still be able to celebrate together?

name: The Other Girl?
overview: As photos of Clea and Arkin kissing circulate, Via can’t help but feel distraught. But it’s another viral photo that might just push Via and Arkin further apart.

name: Ang Ating Wakas
overview: With ArClea fans involving Via’s family and getting more physical, this might just spell the end for Via and Arkin’s relationship.

name: Strangers Now
overview: While Via and Arkin have been living  separate lives, has the love between them truly faded? Or will they fall back into each other’s arms upon seeing each other again?

name: The Architect And The Musician
overview: After a few years in Spain, Via is temporarily back in the Philippines for a project. But with  their mutual connections and Arkin’s popularity, it seems Via just can’t escape his presence.

name: The Nearness Of  You
overview: As Via and Arkin keep on bumping into each other, the former best friends develop a cat-and-dog relationship.

name: Changing Tides
overview: Via and Arkin continue to butt heads every time they see each other. But a beach trip with their friends might just change the waves of their emotions.

name: Like Magnets
overview: Via and Arkin are able to make amends and become friends again. But is this friendship, once again, turning into something more?

name: Tulad Ng Dati
overview: It seems Via and Arkin’s relationship is back to what it was before. Is there finally a happy ending waiting for them?

name: Last Goodbye
overview: Via and Arkin once again find themselves at the center of a scandal. Will this push them apart like it did before?

name: Ginintuang Tanawin
overview: Via has left for Spain once more. But Arkin surprises her by following her there. Can he convince her to go back to the Philippines?
